Home Reports

AI Water Usage Report 2025

This report examines the water consumption patterns of major AI data centers across North America and Europe during 2025.

Key findings indicate that water usage has increased by 35% compared to 2024, driven primarily by the expansion of training infrastructure.

"Data centers consumed an estimated 1.7 billion gallons of water for AI workloads alone."

The study analyzed data from 12 major facilities operated by leading AI companies.

"Without intervention, AI-related water consumption could double by 2027."
